reviews.review_description: This game left my butt cheeks quivering. Please don't buy this game if you have a weak heart.

I played it at night it was scary like Bobby wants you to build. Bobby was upset he jump scared me and my family saw in the tv how was I playing and then I almost brocked my headset lucky it didn’t broke because it cost me like 400 dollars.
It’s so fun to play but you have to have a good boundary and not have a just height on in setting!?!? But it’s so fun 🤩 and just amazing

reviews.review_title: Great little Halloween game for all ages
reviews.review_description:
My video review: https://youtu.be/K1DYKbLwcVw

I love this little horror game. It's accessible and playable on both room scale and stationary, has gorgeous spooky visuals, fun and challenging puzzles (more would be great though), it's great for children and the entire family, and even those new to VR entirely. I like the cool creature NPC and the outcomes if you fail, which makes for more intense gameplay; perfect for Halloween! It's great to have the best time option for extra replay value and the ability to play even locally with the same headset versus your friends on Halloween when they come over for a Halloween party. 

On a side note, it would be great to have a little surprise there at the end when you finish all puzzles.

Overall, Highly Recommended!

Great atmosphere. And I like the real space/ roomscale movement mechanics. I would love more levels and a little finer control of object placement. It would also be fun if Bobby lurked or moved around the room a bit more as time runs out. Although his current interaction was enough to shoot my heart beat into the red! All in all, great concept and nice start.
Great game to scare newcomers into VR
But add option for locomotion and snap turning please. I hope it gets some really cool updates soon like graphics improvements and content. although it's a early access version.

Love the intentionality in design and that you can interact with everything in the room! The sound effects are spot on and really add to the immersive experience! The puzzles are challenging enough that you feel a sense of urgency, in addition to Bobby watching your every move! Definitely gets your heart rate going but keeps you coming back for more!

reviews.review_title: I need to get better at balancing...
reviews.review_description:
Video review here: https://youtu.be/JD67qDh-jWk

I thought this would be a walk in the park, but it turns out balancing a decapitated head on top of some blocks isn't as easy as it looks! Would love to see some extra characters added, maybe some stages with the equally creepy mother or father? Could also add different kinds of games, like that one where you guide the loop around the wire and mustn't touch it...more content like that and you could even charge for this game, I'm sure people would pay, not enough horror puzzle games on Quest!
It's a fun game its so scarry😨😱
It was so scary, but it was awesome!
